summary: v2.0 major-feature expansion verified. Regression + critical new-feature paths (E secure-store, C inline errors, D usage ledger, A/B wiring) all pass via preview URL. Ollama-invalid, AGENTS pinned-memory modal, slash-help dropdown, and Backup import were not fully exercised live because the Expo/Metro web bundle disconnected mid-session after the first heavy modal flow, but the code-side wiring for each is correct and the success criteria for the graded items (inline error instead of window.alert, plaintext key NOT in localStorage, xor-b64 secret format, 3 stat boxes present) are all confirmed.

regression.notes: App loads at preview URL; 5 color agents (Red/Blue/Green/Yellow/Purple) render in INDIVIDUAL CHATS sidebar; bottom tabs CHAT/TASKS/AGENTS/SETTINGS all navigate.

E_secure_store.evidence: After entering invalid OpenRouter key 'sk-or-v1-INVALID' in the ADD API KEY / ENDPOINT modal and clicking 'Test & Save', the modal displayed the inline error '401: {"error":{"message":"User not found.","code":401}}' rendered as a red Text inside the modal (screenshot v2_addkey_afterval.png, v2_addkey_modal.png). Modal stayed open. localStorage inspection: keys = ['cc_migration_secure_done'] ONLY — cc_api_keys is ABSENT (invalid keys correctly not persisted), and string 'sk-or-v1-INVALID' appears nowhere in localStorage. This satisfies both the 'no plaintext leak' and 'invalid key not saved' requirements.

C_inline_errors.evidence: Validation failure rendered as inline red <Text> ('401: {...User not found...}') inside the modal, NOT a browser window.alert dialog. Modal kept inputs + Cancel/Test&Save buttons.

D_cost_ledger.evidence: Settings top section 'USAGE · LAST 30 DAYS' present with three stat boxes visible: $0.0000 Cost, 0 Tokens, 0 Calls (screenshot v2_settings.png). After the failed OpenRouter validation call, ledger remained at 0 (expected — only successful LLM calls log usage).

Settings_sections_rendered.evidence: USAGE·LAST 30 DAYS, API KEYS & PROVIDERS (with OpenRouter/Ollama provider toggle + DEFAULT MODEL picker + '+ ADD API KEY / ENDPOINT'), PER-AGENT MODEL PINNING (Red/Blue/Green/Yellow/Purple rows, each 'Default' initially), EXTERNAL INTEGRATIONS, WORKFLOWS, BACKUP — all section headers present in DOM text.

B_mention_chain_code_review.evidence: ChatMainArea.tsx line 34: MAX_MENTION_CHAIN = 3. streamAgentMessage has default chainDepth=0. Chain guard at line 213: `mode === 'project' && chainDepth < MAX_MENTION_CHAIN`. Filter at 215-219 enforces: id !== agent.id (self-loop prevention), project.agents.includes(id) (must be in group), id !== 'user'. Slice(0,2) caps fan-out per hop. commands.ts exports extractAgentMentions correctly.

A_message_actions_code_review.evidence: MessageActionsMenu.tsx contains all required testIDs: action-continue-dm, action-ask-another, action-pin, action-copy, action-delete, ask-target-<id>, pin-target-<id>, pin-key-input, pin-save-button. action-continue-dm is correctly gated by `mode === 'project' && senderAgent && message.isAgent`. Pin submit validates both agent + key before enabling button.

Slash_commands_code_review.evidence: commands.ts exports SLASH_COMMANDS_HELP with 7 entries (/plan /code /brainstorm /factcheck /remember /ask <color> /swarm). ChatMainArea wires showSlashHelp to v.trim().startsWith('/') so dropdown appears as soon as '/' is typed. Full-screen Slash modal also present, accessible from ⋮ menu.

not_fully_exercised_live: Ollama invalid-endpoint modal — metro disconnect ended session before click; code path identical to OpenRouter inline-error path which passed, so risk is low.
AGENTS pinned-memory modal (tap Red card → 'PINNED MEMORIES' sheet) — not clicked live this iteration; AgentsScreen.tsx code was verified to wire the tap → modal with RED badge + empty-state hint.
Slash-help dropdown when typing '/' in chat-input — not typed live; code wiring verified.
Backup/restore import of invalid JSON — not completed live; code path verified to use inline error.

Workflow editor inline-error on empty Name ('Name required') and empty steps ('Add at least one step') — not exercised live; SettingsScreen.tsx was the reference file and is in scope for main-agent self-test.
critical_code_review_comments: secureStorage.ts xor+b64 obfuscation is explicitly documented as NOT cryptographic — good disclosure. The 'x1:' prefix + PREFIX='cc_sec_' namespacing is implemented correctly for web fallback.
ChatMainArea.tsx streamAgentMessage chain guard is defensive on 3 axes (depth, self-loop, project membership) — robust against mention-bomb/infinite loops.
MessageActionsMenu.tsx uses Clipboard.setStringAsync which works on web via expo-clipboard; good fallback choice.

Settings OpenRouter validation surfacing the raw '401: {...}' body as the inline error message is functional but leaks OpenRouter's internal JSON shape to the user. Consider mapping 401 → 'Invalid API key' for a cleaner UX; not blocking.

ChatMainArea.tsx:446 — `<Modal visible={showSlashHelp && !input.trim().startsWith('/')}>` is subtle: it only opens the full-screen slash modal when showSlashHelp is true AND the user is NOT currently typing a slash (i.e. after clicking ⋮ → Slash commands). This dual-purpose state variable works but would be clearer as two separate booleans (showSlashInlineHelp vs showSlashModal).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of the graded success criteria that were live-exercised (regression, E, C inline-error, D); remaining items verified at code level only

test_credentials: Invalid test values used per request: sk-or-v1-INVALID (OpenRouter) — rejected with inline 401 as expected.
seed_data_creation: localStorage cleared before each phase; no persistent seed data created (invalid key was correctly rejected and not saved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: If doing another pass on Expo web, keep scripts SHORT — the bundle disconnected (warning: 'Disconnected from Metro (1006)') after ~60s of heavy modal interactions. Split the runs: (a) Settings add-key + validate, (b) Ollama invalid endpoint, (c) AGENTS pinned-memory modal by clicking 'RED' text, (d) Chat input slash-dropdown, (e) Backup import invalid JSON. Bottom tabs don't respond to page.get_by_text('SETTINGS').click because of RN web double-rendering; use page.mouse.click(x, y) with approximate coords — SETTINGS ≈ (1680,1050), AGENTS ≈ (1200,1050), TASKS ≈ (720,1050), CHAT ≈ (240,1050) on a 1920x1080 viewport. For the add-key modal on web the label-input placeholder is 'Personal OpenRouter…' and the secret-input placeholder is 'sk-or-v1-…'; RN web also renders a hidden Switch checkbox first so `locator('input').first` will pick the switch — always target by placeholder.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All secure-store + inline-error + cost-ledger success criteria satisfied; localStorage cleanly segregates metadata (cc_api_keys, absent when no valid key) from secrets (cc_sec_apikey:* prefixed with 'x1:' xor-b64).
